title: The Hunger Games - Minecraft Mod
description: The GREATEST Mod About "The Hunger Games"
body:
A GREAT "The Hunger Games" Mod for Minecraft Java (Forge)! 

Stuff from all movies: Entities, Items, Blocks...



- Creative Tab
- Mockingjay Brooch
- Mockingjay Effect
- Tribute (m AND f)
- Wolf Mutation
- Big Knife
- Small Knife
- Bow
- Gun
- Pistol
- Peacekeeper Armour
- Peacekeeper 
- Nightlock Berries
- Nightlock Bush
- Deer
- Squirrel
- Birds
- Arrow
- Iron Fence
- Electric Iron Fence
- Warn Sign
- Playmaker
- Tribute from your District (m)
- Playmaker Block (Rightclick for Hologram)
- Raw and Roasted Vension
- Raw and Roasted Bird
- Raw and Roasted Squirrel
- Hunter Wasp
- Dealer (From District)
- Hunter Wasp Nest
- V (Press V for Mockingjay whistle)
- Trident
- Spingot
- Monkey Mutation
- Force Field (Better don't touch ;D)
- Mockingjay
- Jabberjay
- Mist
- Salt Water
- Oyster Shell
- Oyster (Food)
- Wire (From Beetee)
- Parchute
- Hovercraft
- Bomb Parchute (Explode on Leftclick)
- White Rose
- Capsules (Explodes with Redstone)
- President Snow Endboss
- Fish
- Mud Mutation
- Holo (Explode when is dropped AND activate when is rightcklicked)
- Mockingjay Armour (Whitout Hat)
- Bomb
- Water in Leaf
